subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon on a day wherein the divines of the age turned away, save whom He willed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الافق الاعلی فی یوم فیه اعرض علماء العصر الا من شاء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection of Muhammad, @light and darkness, @call to action, @suffering; rejection of Christ
